source_papers: DeMiguel et al. (2025) - Not All Factors Crowd Equally
Menchero & Morozov (2011) - Decomposition of Risk and Return
Fama & French (2015) - A Five-Factor Asset Pricing Model
Qian & Hua (2004) - Active Risk and Information Ratio
Sneddon (2019) - The Snake in the Box
Li et al. (2023) - Replicating and Digesting Anomalies in Chinese A-share
Asness et al. (2019) - Quality Minus Junk
Clarke et al. (2016) - Risk Parity, Maximum Diversification, and Minimum Variance
Ledoit & Wolf (2004) - A Well-Conditioned Estimator for Large-Dimensional Covariance Matrices
Roncalli (2013) - Introduction to Risk Parity and Budgeting
Harvey et al. (2016) - ... and the Cross-Section of Expected Returns
Garcia-Feijoo et al. (2019) - Factor Investing and Asset Pricing Anomalies
Bender et al. (2018) - Factor Investing and Risk Premia
Blitz & van Vliet (2007) - The Volatility Effect
Asness (2016) - The Value and Momentum Effects

optimization_methods.name: 截面OLS中性化

implementation.signature: def neutralize_ols_residual(factor: pd.Series, controls: pd.DataFrame, min_obs: int = 10) -> pd.Series
implementation.algorithm: 逐date groupby -> np.linalg.lstsq(X, y, rcond=None) -> residuals = y - X @ beta

test_logic: test_neutralize_ols_basic: 构造 y=2x+noise, 回归后残差与x |corr| < 0.05
test_neutralize_ols_industry: 3行业dummy, 回归后各行业均值≈0
test_neutralize_ols_preserve_rank: Spearman rank corr > 0.7

optimization_methods.name: Winsorize去极值

implementation.signature: def winsorize_cross_sectional(series: pd.Series, method: str = 'mad', n_mad: float = 5.0, level: str = 'date') -> pd.Series

expected_effect.outlier_reduction: 消除极端值对回归的扭曲

test_logic: test_winsorize_mad: 含outlier(100)数据, 缩尾后max ≤ median + 5*MAD
test_winsorize_preserves_order: 缩尾前后rank correlation = 1.0

optimization_methods.name: Z-score标准化

implementation.signature: def zscore_cross_sectional(series: pd.Series, level: str = 'date') -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_zscore_cross_sectional: 每date分组后, mean≈0, std≈1

optimization_methods.name: 预处理管线(完整)

implementation.signature: def preprocess_pipeline(factor: pd.Series, controls: pd.DataFrame = None, config: dict = None) -> pd.Series

test_logic: test_preprocess_pipeline_full: 输入raw factor -> 输出中性化zscore, 验证每步属性

optimization_methods.name: IC-IR加权组合

implementation.signature: def combine_factors_ic_weighted(factors: Dict[str, pd.Series], ic_stats: Dict[str, FactorStats], min_ic_ir: float = 0.3) -> pd.Series
implementation.algorithm: 1. filter(ic_ir > min_ic_ir) -> 2. weight = max(|ic_ir|, 0.01) -> 3. normalize -> 4. weighted_sum

min_ic_ir.description: 最低IC-IR门槛，低于此值的因子权重=0

test_logic: test_ic_weighted_sum: 两个IC=0.05的因子组合后IC > 单个因子IC
test_flip_negative: ic_mean<0的因子翻转后IC>0
test_min_ic_ir_filter: ic_ir<0.3的因子权重=0

optimization_methods.name: 去相关贪心筛选

implementation.signature: def decorrelate_selection(factors: Dict[str, pd.Series], candidates: List[str], max_corr: float = 0.6) -> List[str]
implementation.algorithm: 贪心: 选IC-IR最高的 -> 逐个加入, 要求与已选因子|corr|<max_corr

test_logic: test_decorrelate_basic: 3个因子corr=[0.9,0.9,0.3], 选2个(第一个和第三个)
test_decorrelate_all_high_corr: 全部高度相关, 只返回1个

optimization_methods.name: Alpha衰减检测

implementation.signature: def detect_alpha_decay(factor_returns: pd.Series, halflife_window: int = 60) -> dict

expected_effect.early_warning: 提前1-2个月发现因子失效
expected_effect.sharpe_protection: 避免持有失效因子, 减少夏普损失0.2-0.5

test_logic: test_decay_detection: 构造IC从0.05衰减到0.01的序列, 检测点在IC=0.025时触发
test_false_positive: 随机IC序列(IC~0.01)不应触发警告

optimization_methods.name: 因子拥挤度检测

implementation.signature: def detect_factor_crowding(factor: pd.Series, market_data: pd.DataFrame, lookback: int = 60) -> float
implementation.algorithm: 1. 计算因子暴露的横截面集中度 -> 2. 与历史均值比较 -> 3. 输出拥挤度评分

expected_effect.crash_avoidance: 拥挤因子未来回撤预测R²=0.65
expected_effect.sharpe_protection: 避免拥挤导致的-0.5到-1.0夏普损失

test_logic: test_crowding_predicts_crash: 高拥挤度后1个月回撤 > 低拥挤度
test_crowding_vs_mean: 拥挤度 > 历史均值+2σ时触发

optimization_methods.name: Barra风格风险模型

methods.build_factor_exposure: def build_factor_exposure(self, returns: pd.DataFrame, factors: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame
methods.predict_risk: def predict_risk(self, weights: pd.Series, factor_cov: pd.DataFrame) -> float

expected_effect.risk_attribution: 精确分解组合风险来源
expected_effect.unintended_exposure: 识别 unintended size/value 暴露

test_logic: test_factor_exposure_sum: 所有因子暴露的平方和 ≈ 1
test_risk_prediction: 预测风险 vs 实际风险 |误差| < 20%

optimization_methods.name: Ledoit-Wolf协方差收缩

implementation.signature: def ledoit_wolf_shrinkage(returns: pd.DataFrame, shrinkage_target: str = 'constant_correlation') -> pd.DataFrame
implementation.algorithm: 样本协方差 + shrinkage_target -> 最优收缩系数 -> 收缩后协方差

expected_effect.estimation_error: 协方差矩阵估计误差降低30-50%

test_logic: test_positive_definite: 输出矩阵正定
test_shrinkage_amount: 收缩系数在[0,1]之间

optimization_methods.name: 风险平价组合

implementation.signature: def risk_parity_weights(cov_matrix: pd.DataFrame, target_risk: float = None) -> pd.Series
implementation.algorithm: 迭代求解: 每个因子对组合风险的贡献相等

target_risk.description: 目标波动率(年化), None=不约束

test_logic: test_equal_risk_contribution: 各因子风险贡献差异 < 10%

optimization_methods.name: 最大分散化组合

implementation.algorithm: 最大化分散化比率: 组合加权平均波动率 / 组合波动率

test_logic: test_diversification_ratio: DR > 1.5
test_positive_weights: 所有权重 > 0

optimization_methods.name: 最小方差组合

implementation.signature: def min_variance_weights(cov_matrix: pd.DataFrame, allow_short: bool = False) -> pd.Series
implementation.algorithm: 二次规划: min w'Σw s.t. sum(w)=1, w>=0

test_logic: test_sum_to_one: sum(weights) = 1
test_non_negative: all(weights >= 0) if not allow_short

optimization_methods.name: 动量调整权重

implementation.signature: def momentum_adjusted_weights(base_weights: pd.Series, factor_momentum: pd.Series, lookback: int = 60) -> pd.Series
implementation.algorithm: 1. 计算因子动量(过去60日IC) -> 2. 动量强的因子增加权重 -> 3. 动量弱的因子降低权重

expected_effect.adaptive_alpha: 自动增配近期有效的因子

test_logic: test_momentum_boost: 动量强的因子权重 > 基础权重
test_momentum_decay: 动量因子IC衰减后权重自动降低

optimization_methods.name: 波动率目标调整

implementation.signature: def volatility_target_positioning(target_vol: float = 0.15, current_vol: float = None) -> float
implementation.algorithm: 1. 计算组合历史波动率 -> 2. 如果current_vol > target_vol, 减仓 -> 3. 如果current_vol < target_vol, 加仓

expected_effect.volatility_control: 组合波动率稳定在目标附近

test_logic: test_vol_targeting: 组合波动率与目标差异 < 2%

optimization_methods.name: 因子正交化(Gram-Schmidt)

implementation.signature: def gram_schmidt_orthogonalize(factors: Dict[str, pd.Series], ordered_factors: List[str]) -> Dict[str, pd.Series]
implementation.algorithm: 按顺序对每个因子，对之前所有因子回归取残差

ordered_factors.description: 因子处理顺序(先处理重要因子)

expected_effect.zero_correlation: 正交化后因子两两相关系数=0

test_logic: test_zero_correlation: 正交化后所有因子对corr=0
test_ic_preservation: 正交化后IC保持80%以上

optimization_methods.name: 因子半衰期估计

implementation.signature: def estimate_halflife(factor_ic_series: pd.Series, method: str = 'exponential') -> float
implementation.algorithm: 拟合IC衰减曲线: IC(t) = IC0 * exp(-lambda*t) -> 半衰期 = ln(2)/lambda

expected_effect.rebalancing_frequency: 根据半衰期优化调仓频率

test_logic: test_halflife_positive: 半衰期 > 0
test_halflife_consistency: 同一因子多次估计差异 < 20%

optimization_methods.name: 机器学习因子选择

implementation.signature: def ml_factor_selection(factors: pd.DataFrame, returns: pd.Series, method: str = 'xgboost') -> List[str]
implementation.algorithm: 1. XGBoost/LightGBM训练 -> 2. SHAP值解释 -> 3. 选择重要性top-N因子

test_logic: test_outperformance: ML选择组合夏普 > 等权组合
test_stability: 选择结果跨期稳定性 > 70%

optimization_methods.name: Bayesian因子更新

implementation.signature: def bayesian_factor_update(prior_ic: float, new_ic: float, prior_variance: float, observation_variance: float) -> tuple
implementation.algorithm: Kalman Filter: 先验IC + 新观测 -> 后验IC (加权平均, 权重由方差决定)

expected_effect.smooth_weights: 权重变化更平滑, 降低换手率10-20%
expected_effect.noise_reduction: 过滤短期噪声, IC稳定性提升

test_logic: test_shrinkage: 后验IC在先验和新观测之间
test_convergence: 多次观测后后验方差 < 先验方差

optimization_methods.name: walk-forward验证

implementation.signature: def walk_forward_validation(factor: pd.Series, returns: pd.Series, train_window: int, test_window: int, step: int) -> pd.DataFrame
implementation.algorithm: 滚动窗口: 训练期 -> 测试期 -> 前进步长 -> 重复

expected_effect.overfitting_detection: 区分样本内和样本外表现
expected_effect.robustness: 确保因子在不同时间段有效

test_logic: test_in_sample_vs_out: 样本外IC < 样本内IC(正常)
test_consistency: 各窗口IC符号一致
